'''âw-ch-j''' ('''kawachaj''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbaptise|unbaptise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-ch-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbaptise|unbaptise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âw-ch-j
|-
! Lemma
| kawachaj
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwachaj|thiwachaj]] || [[word:jiwachaj|jiwachaj]] || [[word:shiwachaj|shiwachaj]] || [[word:kiwachaj|kiwachaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwachaj|thuthuwachaj]] || [[word:jujuwachaj|jujuwachaj]] || [[word:shushuwachaj|shushuwachaj]] || [[word:kukuwachaj|kukuwachaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwachaj|thuwachaj]] || [[word:juwachaj|juwachaj]] || [[word:shuwachaj|shuwachaj]] || [[word:kuwachaj|kuwachaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwachaj|thuwachaj]] || [[word:juwachaj|juwachaj]] || [[word:shuwachaj|shuwachaj]] || [[word:kuwachaj|kuwachaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewachaj|thewachaj]] || [[word:jewachaj|jewachaj]] || [[word:shewachaj|shewachaj]] || [[word:kewachaj|kewachaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowachaj|thothowachaj]] || [[word:jojowachaj|jojowachaj]] || [[word:shoshowachaj|shoshowachaj]] || [[word:kokowachaj|kokowachaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowachaj|thowachaj]] || [[word:jowachaj|jowachaj]] || [[word:showachaj|showachaj]] || [[word:kowachaj|kowachaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowachaj|thowachaj]] || [[word:jowachaj|jowachaj]] || [[word:showachaj|showachaj]] || [[word:kowachaj|kowachaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠwachaj|thĂŠwachaj]] || [[word:jĂŠwachaj|jĂŠwachaj]] || [[word:shĂŠwachaj|shĂŠwachaj]] || [[word:kĂŠwachaj|kĂŠwachaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawachaj|thathawachaj]] || [[word:jajawachaj|jajawachaj]] || [[word:shashawachaj|shashawachaj]] || [[word:kakawachaj|kakawachaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawachaj|thawachaj]] || [[word:jawachaj|jawachaj]] || [[word:shawachaj|shawachaj]] || [[word:kawachaj|kawachaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawachaj|thawachaj]] || [[word:jawachaj|jawachaj]] || [[word:shawachaj|shawachaj]] || [[word:kawachaj|kawachaj]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawachaj|shawachaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawachaj|goshawachaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawachaj|gokishawachaj]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawachajnĂŒ|shawachajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawachajnknĂŒ|goshawachajnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawachajnĂŒ|gokishawachajnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawachajshĂ«|shawachajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawachajnkshĂ«|goshawachajnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawachajshĂ«|gokishawachajshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawachajro|shawachajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawachajnkro|goshawachajnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawachajro|gokishawachajro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawachajmu|shawachajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawachajnkmu|goshawachajnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawachajmu|gokishawachajmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawachajsher|shawachajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawachajnksher|goshawachajnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawachajsher|gokishawachajsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawachajng|shawachajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawachajnkng|goshawachajnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawachajng|gokishawachajng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawachajya|shawachajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawachajnkya|goshawachajnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawachajya|gokishawachajya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawachajyam|shawachajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawachajnkyam|goshawachajnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawachajyam|gokishawachajyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawachajnĂŒshĂ«|shawachajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawachajnknĂŒshĂ«|goshawachajnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawachajnĂŒshĂ«|gokishawachajnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawachajnĂŒro|shawachajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawachajnknĂŒro|goshawachajnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawachajnĂŒro|gokishawachajnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawachajnĂŒmu|shawachajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawachajnknĂŒmu|goshawachajnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawachajnĂŒmu|gokishawachajnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawachajshĂ«nĂŒ|shawachajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawachajnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshawachajnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawachajshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishawachajshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawachajshĂ«ro|shawachajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawachajnkshĂ«ro|goshawachajnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawachajshĂ«ro|gokishawachajshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawachajshĂ«mu|shawachajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawachajnkshĂ«mu|goshawachajnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawachajshĂ«mu|gokishawachajshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawachajronĂŒ|shawachajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawachajnkronĂŒ|goshawachajnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawachajronĂŒ|gokishawachajronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawachajroshĂ«|shawachajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawachajnkroshĂ«|goshawachajnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawachajroshĂ«|gokishawachajroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawachajromu|shawachajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawachajnkromu|goshawachajnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawachajromu|gokishawachajromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawachajmunĂŒ|shawachajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawachajnkmunĂŒ|goshawachajnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawachajmunĂŒ|gokishawachajmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawachajmushĂ«|shawachajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawachajnkmushĂ«|goshawachajnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawachajmushĂ«|gokishawachajmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawachajmuro|shawachajmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawachajnkmuro|goshawachajnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawachajmuro|gokishawachajmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
